steps.title: Recognize the embedded clause
steps.content: The sentence is a statement: his voice acting work is why something happened. The blank is an embedded noun clause, so it needs normal statement word order and statement punctuation.

steps.title: Use statement order
steps.content: Choice A and Choice B use inverted question word order. Choice C uses correct word order but ends the declarative sentence with a question mark. The remaining choice uses subject-verb order and a period. The answer is D.
